## Release Checklist

- [ ] Active tab: add task works and progress updates
- [ ] Worklog tab: add session appears in timeline
- [ ] Weekly tab: standup, summary, analytics, diagnostics render
- [ ] Backup export/import works
- [ ] Diff modal works (colored `+ / - / ~`, `Compact/Detailed`, `Cancel/Apply`)
- [ ] Undo from snapshots restores expected state
- [ ] Offline queue increments offline and flushes online
- [ ] Preferences persist across refresh and reset works
